Manage Acumatica Sites 0.1.1+2619cdf7ac7b34540e56cb83b399634d62b67b3c

Manage Acumatica Site (database, files).

Usage: MainSite [command] [options]

Options:
  --version    Show version information.
  -h|--help    Show help information.
  -c|--config  Show config information.

Commands:
  CreateSite   Create Acumatica Site (database, files).
  DeleteSite   Delete Acumatica Site (database, files).
  ExportDb     Export database to bacpac file.
  ImportDb     Import bacpac file to database.
  ListSites    List current iis sites.
  SwitchDb     Switch site to use another database.

Export database 0.1.1+2619cdf7ac7b34540e56cb83b399634d62b67b3c

Export database to bacpac file.

Usage: MainSite ExportDb [options]

Options:
  --version      Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.
  -d|--db        Database source name.
  -s|--server    Server source name.
  -f|--file      BacPac file path target.
  -u|--user      Database user name.
  -p|--password  Database user password.
